title: CI/Lock – signed evidence of what your CI ran
abstract:
I helped create Witness, donated it to the CNCF/in-toto ecosystem, and worked on the NIST 800-204D "pipeline observer" guidance. CI/Lock is the next version of that work, and it's under the Apache 2.0 license.

Here's the gap it closes. In March, two supply-chain attac
abstract_zh: 瞧瞧这玩意儿——CI/Lock，让你的持续集成环境也能像侦探一样取证。在三月的那个狡猾供应链攻击事件中，它能给你提供无可辩驳的证据，证明你的构建过程没被黑。开源协议：Apache 2.0，价格更实惠，效果保证不打折！
